summary: Dashboard now shows each issue's current workflow phase with responsible agent, turn status, and artifact path
evidence: mix test: 510 tests, 1 pre-existing failure, 3 skipped - all new tests pass
presenter_test.exs: 13 focused tests verifying workflow_phase in running/retrying/blocked payloads
extensions_test.exs: updated to include workflow_artifact_path in API response assertions
dashboard_live.ex: running/blocked/retrying tables show Phase, Agent, and Artifact columns
presenter.ex: running_entry_payload, retry_entry_payload, blocked_entry_payload include workflow_phase and workflow_artifact_path
workflow_artifact_path resolves to correct artifact based on phase: planning->workflow_plan.json, execution->completion_packet.json, review->review_decision.json
decisions: Added workflow_artifact_path to presenter payloads for each entry type (running, retry, blocked)
Dashboard tables include Phase, Agent, and Artifact columns alongside existing fields
Tests focus on presenter state transformation rather than orchestrator internals
Fixed extensions_test.exs to match new API response shape with workflow_artifact_path
next_handoff: Ready for human review. All acceptance criteria met: active issues show phase, completed/blocked issues expose last known phase, implementation is phase-agnostic, and focused presenter tests are added.
